title: Workspace spend caps
description: Optional per-workspace monthly USD budget. checkSpendCap sums this month's workspaceUsageDaily estimated cost and, once the workspace's cap is reached, callForUser rejects new model calls (quota_exceeded). setSpendCap (admin) / getSpendStatus (viewer) drive a SpendCapCard bar. Reuses the existing workspaces.capUsdPerMonth field — no new table. Cost is an estimate, not a bill.
